position_news.summary: Please find enclosed herewith the Certificate received from MUFG Intime India Private Limited (formerly Link Intime India Private Limited), Company s Registrar and Share Transfer Agent for the quarter ended 30th June 2026 certifying compliance with Regulation 74(5) of the SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018. |SUBJECT: Certificate under SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018

recent_announcements.summary: Equippp Social Impact Technologies Limited has informed the Exchange about the execution of Memorandum of Understanding with The Secretary To Legislature (ASSEMBLY) Telangana State Legislature Secretariat, Hyderabad on 15th July 2026. |SUBJECT: Agreements

Shyam Metalics And Energy Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated July 16, 2026, titled "Shyam Metalics Commissions Aluminium Foil Facility in Odisha; Aluminium FRP plant on Track for September Launch". |SUBJECT: Press Release
